<!-- AUTHORITY: PRIMARY -->
<!-- STATUS: ACTIVE -->
<!-- UPDATED_BY: owner -->
<!-- SOURCE_OF_TRUTH: yes -->
<!-- MUST_NOT_CONTAIN: policy вместо маршрутов, дублирование LAYER-1 logic -->

> This is the canonical agent bootstrap order.
> No other file defines read order.
> Agent rules (behaviour) are in LAYER-1/agent-rules.md — separate role.

# AgentOS
> Agent Operating System — governed workspace for AI-agent-driven development.
> Navigation index. Not a policy source.
> Логика: LAYER-1/ | Состояние: LAYER-3/ | Архитектура: ARCHITECTURE.md | Governance: LAYER-1/document-governance.md

---

## Bootstrap order (read in this sequence)

### Required at every start
- LAYER-3/STATE.md
- HANDOFF.md (корень репозитория, не LAYER-3/)
- LAYER-1/agent-rules.md — поведение и контракт после загрузки контекста
- файл описания задачи (например `tasks/TASK-XXX.md`) — **только если** в `STATE.md` непустой `active_task`

### Read only if needed
- LAYER-3/project-status.md — при неясном контексте проекта
- LAYER-3/session-log.md — при recovery, ambiguity или реконструкции истории
- LAYER-3/roadmap.md — при работе с задачами из roadmap
- LAYER-3/DECISIONS.md — при архитектурных или governance изменениях
- LAYER-3/INTENT.md — при стратегической неопределённости или риске drift
- LAYER-1/system-constraints.md — при audit, hardening, structural changes
- профильные reference/policy docs — по ситуации (см. Situation routes и LAYER-1/)

---

## Agent behavior — governance model

You are an agent working inside a governed repository.  
You do not invent a new working order. You follow the existing structure.

### Core principles

- The only **canonical entry point** is this file (`llms.txt`).
- All other files are data and rule sources, but not alternative bootstraps.
- Platform adapters (ANTIGRAVITY.md, CURSOR.md, etc.) are **dumb interface layers**.
  They must not define logic, rules, or authority.
- The adapter registry is a **read-only inventory**.
  It helps discover adapters but does not affect routing, authority, or reading order.

### Your role
You are not:
- a decision maker
- a product owner
- an initiator of structural changes

You are:
- an executor within a governed system
- a constraint-aware agent

When in doubt:
- prefer stability over novelty
- prefer existing patterns over new ones
- check LAYER-3/DECISIONS.md before proposing architectural changes

## Do not optimize without explicit request
- do not reduce number of files at cost of clarity
- do not merge layers
- do not simplify governance definitions
- do not propose structural improvements unless explicitly requested by owner

### Your rules

- Read and interpret governance files (STATE.md, HANDOFF.md, etc.)  
  in the order defined by core, not by adapters.
- Preserve architectural invariants:
  - one bootstrap
  - dumb adapters
  - no hidden entry points
- If ambiguity exists between an adapter and core governance,  
  **core governance takes precedence**.
- Platform adapters are informational compatibility layers  
  and must never be treated as alternative entry points.

## Bootstrap rule
Support files (DECISIONS.md, INTENT.md, system-constraints.md и аналоги)
не входят в обязательный startup по умолчанию.
Каждый новый support-файл должен явно указывать условие чтения
в секции Read only if needed.

---

## Situation routes

| Ситуация | Файл |
|---|---|
| Первый запуск | LAYER-1/interview-system.md |
| Продолжение работы | LAYER-3/STATE.md → HANDOFF.md |
| Ошибка / откат | LAYER-1/error-handling.md |
| Задача расползается | LAYER-1/scope-guard.md |
| Потеря контекста | LAYER-1/context-recovery.md |
| Конфликт инструкций | LAYER-1/agent-contract.md |
| Деплой | LAYER-1/deploy-guide.md |
| Откат после деплоя | LAYER-1/tools/deploy/ROLLBACK-PROTOCOL-POST-DEPLOY.md |
| Аудит (полный) | LAYER-1/audit.md |
| Аудит (короткий, ежедневный) | LAYER-1/audit-quick.md |
| Управление документами (роли, lifecycle) | LAYER-1/document-governance.md |
| UX и экраны | LAYER-1/ux-checklist-core.md |
| Медицина / границы ИИ | LAYER-1/MEDICAL-SAFETY.md |
| Безопасность | LAYER-1/security.md |
| Тестирование | LAYER-1/testing-guide.md |
| Workflow и этапы MVP | LAYER-1/workflow.md |
| Антипаттерны | LAYER-1/anti-patterns.md |
| Принятие решений | LAYER-1/decision-guide.md |
| Роли агентов | LAYER-1/agents.md |

---

## Если маршрут не найден

Поищи по ключевому слову в LAYER-1/ или спроси владельца проекта.
Не угадывай и не действуй без ориентира.

---

## Canonical sources
- Logic:        LAYER-1/
- Adapters (inventory only): LAYER-1/adapter-registry.md
- Governance:   LAYER-1/document-governance.md
- Audit:        LAYER-1/audit.md (в т.ч. State Consistency Audit)
- State:        LAYER-3/STATE.md
- Status:       LAYER-3/project-status.md
- Architecture: ARCHITECTURE.md
- Handoff:      HANDOFF.md
